description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rust:latest Docker image and a global before_script that updates apt, installs build-essential, and adds the clippy component via rustup. Define a build job that runs cargo build. Add a test:cargo job that runs rustc --version && cargo --version, then cargo test --all --verbose, cargo test --all --all-features --verbose, and cargo test --all --no-default-features --verbose. Add a test:lint job that runs cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings. All jobs inherit the before_script and no caching, artifacts, or conditional rules are specified.
